name: Apprentice Carnifex
description: Circle 7 (Violence) — a young butcher-demon still serving its apprenticeship in carnage. In life it committed violence enthusiastically but without mastery — bar fights, senseless assaults, cruelty that was thrilling rather than purposeful. Now it is apprenticed to something ancient and terrible, learning its trade. It carries a cleaver already too large for it that it wields with reckless abandon. It is covered in blood that is not entirely its own. Its eyes are wide — not with fear but with the sick excitement of something discovering what it is capable of. It wants to be here. That's what makes it dangerous.

textToImageTask.prompt: A lean eager bipedal humanoid goat demon in A-pose, wiry murderous frame, deep red-brown fur soaked dark with blood, eyes wide with bloodlust and sick excitement, medium sharp horns stained crimson, leather apron of a butcher's trade blackened with old blood, wickedly sharp claws already proven, digitigrade goat legs with blood-soaked hooves, the posture of something discovering its own violence with delight, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Lean eager wiry goat demon apprentice butcher, deep red-brown fur soaked dark with blood, wide bloodlust eyes, sharp horns stained crimson, leather apron blackened with old blood, digitigrade hooves, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Deep red-brown fur soaked dark with blood in patches, butcher leather apron texture blackened with layers of old dried blood, wide wide-open bloodlust golden eyes, sharp horns with dried blood in the grooves, wicked claws proven sharp, blood-soaked hooves, eager murderous posture of something learning its true nature
